prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the food subject, transform the photo into a refined vintage scientific specimen plate / illustrated food diagram on a clean off-white paper background. Preserve the same sizzling-plate meal components and overall arrangement, but redraw them as detailed hand-colored botanical/culinary field-guide illustrations with ink outlines, watercolor texture, subtle paper grain, and precise diagram callouts. Add a centered Traditional Chinese title 鐵板標本圖鑑, a subtitle 香煎雞腿排・荷包蛋・青花菜・蘑菇醬鐵板麵, and small plate-number typography in the top corners. Create exactly 4 numbered annotation sections around the main dish: I. 香煎雞腿排, II. 青花菜, III. 蘑菇醬鐵板麵, IV. 荷包蛋, each with short Traditional Chinese explanatory text and dotted leader lines pointing to the corresponding ingredient. Add exactly 4 square letter markers on the dish and legend: A 香煎雞腿排, B 青花菜, C 荷包蛋, D 蘑菇醬鐵板麵. Include exactly 6 supplemental illustrations/insets: a close-up of the seared chicken surface, a broccoli specimen with approximate size marks, a noodle close-up, a fried egg close-up, a small skillet of mushroom cream sauce, and a low side-view cross-section of the entire plated meal. Add two small boxed notes near the bottom, one legend box and one observation note box, plus footer text including 美食愛好者, 2024 年, and 臺灣・日常餐桌. Keep the composition poster-like, balanced, educational, appetizing, and more polished than the original photo.
